headerTitle: Senior Full Stack Engineer  ·  Automotive Analytics SaaS  ·  Claude Code Native  ·  High-Ownership Startup Engineering
intro: VolTra is the analytics layer for car dealerships — pulling DMS and CRM data and surfacing the numbers that actually matter. The first engineering hire outside the founding team needs full ownership, fast shipping, and direct customer communication.
bullets: Claude Code as primary development environment — parallel agents for feature implementation, PR review, and test resolution simultaneously. Review every AI-generated diff. Anthropic API familiarity is the current working mode, not a nice-to-have.

TypeScript, Next.js 15, PostgreSQL in production — 13 platforms, 100+ API routes, Prisma ORM, multi-tenant architecture patterns. Next.js + Supabase + PostgreSQL is the daily stack. Can ship a meaningful PR in week one.

Third-party data integration — county appraisal district APIs, Stripe, Twilio/Sinch, Google OAuth2, IMAP, webhook pipelines. Messy real-world data from undocumented schemas under real operational load. The automotive DMS/CRM integration challenge is the same class of problem.
matchNotes: Good stack match: Next.js/TypeScript/PostgreSQL/Supabase, Claude Code daily use, high-ownership startup culture, 3rd-party API integration experience. Not a formal FDE role — standard startup SWE hire. Automotive domain is new. $100-201K wide range (upper end is strong). First eng hire responsibility is a good fit for the ownership model.
